mapper.insert: REPLACE INTO operator_progression_statistical_result (id, sample_size, statistical_result, record_type, create_time) SELECT #{item.id}, #{item.sampleSize}, #{item.statisticalResult}, #{item.recordType}, #{item.createTime} FROM operator_progression_statistical_result WHERE record_type = 1 UNION ALL SELECT #{item.id}, #{item.sampleSize}, #{item.statisticalResult}, #{item.recordType}, #{item.createTime} WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM operator_progression_statistical_result WHERE record_type = 1 )
